paymentDate.description: travel-expense payment date (旅費支払日) as printed

preparationDate.description: preparation date (作成年月日) as printed

tripRows.description: one entry per trip-leg row; flattened across all employees

employeeNumber.description: employee number (社員番号) this row belongs to

departureDateTime.description: departure date and time (出発日時) as printed, e.g. 06/05 08:30

returnDateTime.description: return date and time (帰着日時) as printed

distanceCategory.description: distance category (距離区分), e.g. 隔地 / 附近 / 地域

purposeCategory.description: purpose category (目的区分), e.g. 業務 / 研修

destination.description: destination organization (出張先) in original Japanese; normalize all parentheses to fullwidth （ ）

route.description: route segment (区間) in original Japanese, origin and destination separated by a fullwidth dash － (U+FF0D); normalize any horizontal-bar separator including the kanji 一 to － and drop surrounding spaces, e.g. 東京－大阪

nights.description: number of nights stayed (宿泊数); 0 or omit if blank

employeeSubtotals.description: one entry per employee group, holding that employee's 合計 subtotal

headcount.description: total headcount from the bottom 合計 line (人)

grandTotal.description: grand total (合計) in yen at the bottom
